channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Future of Artificial Intelligence: A Global Challenge
item.description: The intersection of artificial intelligence, safety measures, and the role of governments in shaping its future.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CMMC Tax Credit Gains Traction as Small Businesses Face Compliance Costs
item.description: Legislation on Capitol Hill aims to provide a tax credit for smaller businesses to help defray the costs of complying with the Defense Department's Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification program.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety. Trump’s vow to undo Biden’s AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: Their agenda addresses topics such as how to better detect and combat a flood of AI-generated deepfakes fueling fraud, harmful impersonation and sexual abuse.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: NetOps startup Selector AI wants to solve the network noise problem
item.description: Back in 2019, Kannan Kothandaraman helped to start Selector AI after spending years in the networking trenches at big vendors including Juniper and Cisco.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Comcast to spin off cable networks that were once the entertainment giant's star performers
item.description: Comcast is spinning off into a new company many of its cable television networks that were once at the heart of the entertainment giant, as consumers increasingly swap out their cable TV subscriptions for streaming platforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Why the crypto community loves Howard Lutnick, Trump’s pick for Commerce secretary
item.description: Donald Trump’s selection on Tuesday of Howard Lutnick as Commerce secretary brought cheers from the cryptocurrency sector. Little surprise there. Lutnick has long advocated for cryptocurrency to be treated on equal footing with other financial assets.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Ukraine has seen success in building clean energy, which is harder for Russia to destroy
item.description: This year, Russian missile attacks have knocked out about 50% of Ukraine's power generation, a major threat as winter looms.
item.dc:creator: Peter Prengaman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Perplexity adds AI-assisted shopping features
item.description: Artificial intelligence search startup Perplexity on Monday launched a shopping hub to attract users, in a bid to beef up its platform as it attempts to take on Alphabet-owned Google’s dominance in the search engine space.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon and SpaceX are challenging the NLRB’s constitutionality in federal court
item.description: Attorneys for Amazon and Elon Musk’s SpaceX argued in a federal appeals court Monday that the National Labor Relations Board’s structure is unconstitutional, advancing a legal fight that may last into the Trump administration where Musk is expected to oversee bureaucratic cost-cutting.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Business Internet Security: Everything You Need to Consider
item.description: Cyber-attacks can cost companies millions of dollars in lost revenue, legal fees, and recovery efforts. A security breach can severely tarnish a company’s reputation and customer trust, making comprehensive internet security crucial for your small business.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The 5 next big things in AR, VR, spatial computing, and multiverse for 2024
item.description: No, the Apple Vision Pro didn’t prove to be the iPhone of AR, but augmented and virtual experiences got a fresh jolt of energy in 2024 all the same.
item.dc:creator: Mark Wilson, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft pitches AI 'agents' that can perform tasks on their own at Ignite 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella told customers at a conference in Chicago on Tuesday that the company is teaching a new set of artificial intelligence tools how to "act on our behalf across our work and life.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nvidia Unveils GB200 NVL4 Superchip: A Game-Changer for Servers
item.description: Nvidia's latest innovation, the GB200 NVL4 Superchip, promises to revolutionize servers with its unprecedented performance and efficiency.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NIST’s quantum standards: The time for upgrades is now
item.description: Quantum computing is farther along than most realize, and it's time to safeguard against cybersecurity threats posed by those who will use quantum technologies. The post NIST’s quantum standards: The time for upgrades is now first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: German police break up an environmental activists' camp near Tesla plant outside Berlin
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German police broke up a protest camp housing environmental activists in a forest near the Tesla electric car factory in Grünheide outside Berlin on Tuesday, citing violations of public safety and order.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump appears to be planning to attend SpaceX ‘Starship’ launch scheduled for Tuesday in Texas
item.description: Trump’s visit comes as billionaire Musk has been a near-constant presence at Trump’s side as he builds out his administration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Company affiliated with Alex Jones seeks to disqualify The Onion's auction bid on Infowars
item.description: A company affiliated with conspiracy theorist Alex Jones asked a federal judge on Monday to disqualify a bid by the satirical news outlet The Onion to buy Jones' Infowars at a bankruptcy auction, alleging fraud and collusion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Spin 3.0 supports polyglot development using Wasm components
item.description: Fermyon has released Spin 3.0, a major update to its open source developer tool for building serverless WebAssembly applications. The new release introduces polyglot programming to ease development. The update to Fermyon’s Spin framework was introduced November 11.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: In Cyprus, Ukrainians learn how to dispose of landmines that kill and maim hundreds
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — In a Cypriot National Guard camp, Ukrainians are being trained on how to identify, locate and dispose of landmines and other unexploded munitions that litter huge swaths of their country, killing and maiming hundreds of people, including children.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: One Tech Tip: Replacing passwords with passkeys for an easier login experience
item.description: LONDON (AP) — If you're tired of memorizing passwords, then give passkeys a try. You might have noticed that many online services are now offering the option of using passkeys, a digital authentication method touted as an easier and more secure way to log in.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Solar-powered aircraft achieves groundbreaking 22-hour autonomous flight
item.description: Skydweller is the world's largest unmanned solar-powered aircraft that can stay airborne for weeks, and even months, without refueling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
